description: Portable template governance policy. Repos can customize review classes, roles, approval rules, escalation guidance, and notification-evidence expectations without adding live meeting or notification infrastructure.

roles.template_owner: Owns the changed template or template family.
roles.foundation_maintainer: Maintains the portable foundation contract and guard behavior.
roles.compatibility_reviewer: Reviews migration, rollback, and compatibility impact for breaking changes.
roles.emergency_approver: Approves urgent changes that bypass normal review sequencing.

routine.approval: One template-owner approval or equivalent active-session decision record.
routine.escalation: No escalation required unless guard, tests, or user feedback reveal compatibility risk.
required_evidence: DECISIONS.md entry when a design choice is made
CHANGELOG.md entry for user-visible template behavior changes
focused test or guard evidence when behavior changes

coordinated.approval: Template-owner and foundation-maintainer acknowledgement recorded in work tracking.
coordinated.escalation: Escalate to breaking review if compatibility or migration risk is identified.

breaking.approval: All listed roles or explicit user approval recorded in DECISIONS.md.
breaking.escalation: Create migration and rollback notes before merge; defer if evidence is incomplete.
required_evidence: guard, focused test, and relevant integration evidence

emergency.approval: Explicit user approval and emergency-bypass record before merge.
emergency.escalation: Follow the repo-local emergency response policy and create a post-incident follow-up task.
